text:
The surgical procedure version code (variables SRGCL_PRCDR_VRSN_CD_1–
SRGCL_PRCDR_VRSN_CD_25) indicates whether this code is ICD-9 or ICD-10. 

PRCDRCD7–PRCDRCD25 were new in 2009 (earlier surgical procedure codes were available all years; we 
had 1–6 historically). 

The principal procedure code is stored as the first procedure code (PRCDRCD1). ^ Back to TOC ^
